leadText: Dyna Tree Hill (Japanese: ダイ木の丘 Dai Tree Hill) is a location in the Galar region. It connects to Ballimere Lake to the east.

sections.title: Geography
sections.text: Geography [ edit | edit source ] Encountering the Galarian Legendary birds Dyna Tree Hill is a hill surrounded by Ballimere Lake . Its most prominent feature is a giant tree named Dyna Tree, which seems to be infused with Dynamax energy. Galarian Articuno , Zapdos , and Moltres congregate at the tree to eat on its fruits.
